languages.original_text: "Easy there, old man, easy. It's not the real palace, it's just a little toy house that someone's tried very hard to make out of illusion and trickery. But there's definitely someone alive inside, I can feel it in my gut."

languages.text: "Легче, старик, легче. Это не настоящий дворец, а игрушечный домик, который кто-то очень старался вылепить из иллюзий и надувательства. Но вот внутри него точно есть кто-то живой, нутром чую".

"Easy there, old man, easy. It's not the real palace, it's just a little toy house that someone's tried very hard to make out of illusion and trickery. But there's definitely someone alive inside, I can feel it in my gut."
languages.original_text: "Легче, старик, легче. Это не настоящий дворец, а игрушечный домик, который кто-то очень старался вылепить из иллюзий и надувательства. Но вот внутри него точно есть кто-то живой, нутром чую".

"Easy there, old man, easy. It's not the real palace, it's just a little toy house that someone's tried very hard to make out of illusion and trickery. But there's definitely someone alive inside, I can feel it in my gut."

languages.text: 「落ち着けよ、老人、落ち着け。これは本物の宮殿じゃない、ただの小さな玩具の家だ。誰かが幻術とトリックで作ったものだ。でも、中には確実に生きている人がいる。直感でわかる」
languages.original_text: "Easy there, old man, easy. It's not the real palace, it's just a little toy house that someone's tried very hard to make out of illusion and trickery. But there's definitely someone alive inside, I can feel it in my gut."

traits.locale_text: 「落ち着けよ、老人、落ち着け。これは本物の宮殿じゃない、ただの小さな玩具の家だ。誰かが幻術とトリックで作ったものだ。でも、中には確実に生きている人がいる。直感でわかる」

languages.text: « Du calme, mon vieux, du calme. Ce n'est pas le vrai palais, juste une petite maison de poupées que quelqu'un s'est appliqué à reproduire avec des illusions et des tours. Mais il y a bien quelqu'un de vivant à l'intérieur, j'en mettrais ma main au feu. »
languages.original_text: "Easy there, old man, easy. It's not the real palace, it's just a little toy house that someone's tried very hard to make out of illusion and trickery. But there's definitely someone alive inside, I can feel it in my gut."

traits.locale_text: « Du calme, mon vieux, du calme. Ce n'est pas le vrai palais, juste une petite maison de poupées que quelqu'un s'est appliqué à reproduire avec des illusions et des tours. Mais il y a bien quelqu'un de vivant à l'intérieur, j'en mettrais ma main au feu. »

languages.text: "Ruhig, alter Mann, ganz ruhig. Das ist nicht der echte Palast, nur ein kleines Spielhaus, das jemand mittels Hexerei und einer Illusion geschaffen hat. Aber in seinem Inneren lebt jemand. Das sagt mir mein Bauchgefühl."
languages.original_text: "Easy there, old man, easy. It's not the real palace, it's just a little toy house that someone's tried very hard to make out of illusion and trickery. But there's definitely someone alive inside, I can feel it in my gut."

traits.locale_text: "Ruhig, alter Mann, ganz ruhig. Das ist nicht der echte Palast, nur ein kleines Spielhaus, das jemand mittels Hexerei und einer Illusion geschaffen hat. Aber in seinem Inneren lebt jemand. Das sagt mir mein Bauchgefühl."

languages.text: "Sakin ol ihtiyar, sakin ol. Gerçek saray değil bu, sadece birinin illüzyon ve hileyle yapmaya çok uğraştığı küçük bir oyuncak ev. Faka içeride kesinlikle canlı biri var, hissedebiliyorum."
languages.original_text: "Easy there, old man, easy. It's not the real palace, it's just a little toy house that someone's tried very hard to make out of illusion and trickery. But there's definitely someone alive inside, I can feel it in my gut."

traits.locale_text: "Sakin ol ihtiyar, sakin ol. Gerçek saray değil bu, sadece birinin illüzyon ve hileyle yapmaya çok uğraştığı küçük bir oyuncak ev. Faka içeride kesinlikle canlı biri var, hissedebiliyorum."

languages.text: «Tranquilo, viejo, no se altere. No es el verdadero palacio, sino una casita de juguete que alguien se ha tomado muchas molestias para construir a base de ilusiones y artificios. Pero dentro vive alguien, eso está claro; lo noto en las tripas».
languages.original_text: "Easy there, old man, easy. It's not the real palace, it's just a little toy house that someone's tried very hard to make out of illusion and trickery. But there's definitely someone alive inside, I can feel it in my gut."

traits.locale_text: «Tranquilo, viejo, no se altere. No es el verdadero palacio, sino una casita de juguete que alguien se ha tomado muchas molestias para construir a base de ilusiones y artificios. Pero dentro vive alguien, eso está claro; lo noto en las tripas».

languages.text: “别激动，老家伙。那不是真正的宫殿，只是有人用幻术与欺诈之法精心塑造出的玩具屋。但里面绝对有活物，我的直觉错不了。”
languages.original_text: "Easy there, old man, easy. It's not the real palace, it's just a little toy house that someone's tried very hard to make out of illusion and trickery. But there's definitely someone alive inside, I can feel it in my gut."
